author: Jdub
content:
What's up, everyone! 

Super excited to see all the new and familiar faces in the room. 

We have had a successful launch and now we are just making sure that everyone settled down for the live trading starting tomorrow!

As for the live trading, I will be live every single day at 9:15am EST on the Trading Floor Spaces (Voice)

As for the weekly outlooks, I will be providing them every single Sunday with a PDF file along with a video detailing what I'm looking at going into the week.

The PDF file will include the market overview, economic events happening in the market, and charts that I'm looking at for the week.

This is going to be extremely valuable for you to keep organized to have all your resources in one PDF.

<@&1219020123218645102> 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z5YzSDc6UBA
